introSection: Magic Dragon is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently located at Camel Creek Adventure Park in Tredinnick, Cornwall, England, UK.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The coaster originally operated at Drayton Manor Theme Park in Fazeley, Staffordshire, England, in 1984. It was located near the front entrance in the Robinsons Land area, where the Thomas Land area is now. It was removed in 2007 to make way for the Troublesome Trucks Runaway Coaster, a Gerstlauer Junior Coaster that opened with Thomas Land a year later.

It opened at Funland Hayling Island on 21 March 2008 and was called Super Dragon until 2016, when it was renamed Funlandasaurus. It was removed following the 2019 season.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Green track and purple supports, used to have red track and white supports when under the Super Dragon name.

fullText:
Magic Dragon is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently located at Camel Creek Adventure Park in Tredinnick, Cornwall, England, UK.

The coaster originally operated at Drayton Manor Theme Park in Fazeley, Staffordshire, England, in 1984. It was located near the front entrance in the Robinsons Land area, where the Thomas Land area is now. It was removed in 2007 to make way for the Troublesome Trucks Runaway Coaster, a Gerstlauer Junior Coaster that opened with Thomas Land a year later.

It opened at Funland Hayling Island on 21 March 2008 and was called Super Dragon until 2016, when it was renamed Funlandasaurus. It was removed following the 2019 season.



Green track and purple supports, used to have red track and white supports when under the Super Dragon name.
